title: Cerise's Consistent Mace
description: A better Mace, Keeping it consistent with the Trident and Spyglass!
body:
![A hand holding the mace model, with the text "hit your shot, with the consistent mace" it's a pretty fire render.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1050c6b584f948dccec182cd90bea560484d8b9d_0.webp)
Restore visual consistency. This resource pack replaces the flat Held mace with a clean 3D model when equipped, matching the style of items like the Trident and Spyglass while leaving inventory and world visuals unchanged.
___ ## Archived: > This project is no longer maintained and will not receive further updates indefinitely. > it remains available for those who prefer this visual tweak. ## What it does: - Replaces the flat Mace **only when held** with a 3D model - Keeps the original 2D texture in: - - GUI - - Item Frames - - Dropped items - Maintains the vanilla texture & style.
In Game Images ![Still 2D items for drops and item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2cbf22ae65311cabdf6c6635ea3057affa1b951_0.webp) - Still 2D items for drops and item frames
![Non-Enchanted Mace Model held in hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c66b734c57ed2ef5ccf590f865a82d246c92174b_0.webp) - A clean 3D model for when you hold the Mace in your equipped slot.
![Enchanted Mace Model held in hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4a3484b4c70e255c83357b8795f62d28aae35b6_0.webp) - Keeping the good looks when Enchanted.
___ ## Looking for something in development? If you enjoyed this tweak, you may be interested in my current project: [![GrimVeil Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6c829167ae2364e66c02d94b717073af7ba19b9_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/grimveil) A dark exploration mod that adds **The Lost Woods**. A hostile, hand-crafted region filled with a new encounter, material, and structures. Designed to be uncovered through observation and exploration rather than guided progression. Actively developed and expanding.
Available exlusively on Modrinth: [**GrimVeil**](https://modrinth.com/mod/grimveil)
